name: Bagani Amihan 4T Tempest
shortDesc: High speed top choice motorcycle engine oil. Superior protection for high-power 4-stroke engines.
description: A high-quality multi-grade engine oil developed for four-stroke motorcycle engines, including both air-cooled and water-cooled systems. Advanced wear protection formulation helps maintain consistent engine protection, particularly in motorcycles operating under high power and demanding conditions.
description2: API SL / JASO MA-2 certified. Available in SAE 20W-50 and SAE 20W-40 grades. Suitable for both on-road motorcycles and off-road dirt bikes.

features.title: Excellent Wear Protection
features.desc: Reduces friction and protects critical engine components from premature wear under high-power conditions.

features.title: Engine Cleanliness
features.desc: Effective detergent and dispersant additives keep internal engine parts clean and free of deposits.

features.title: Stable Viscosity Performance
features.desc: High viscosity index with strong TBN reserves ensures reliable lubrication during cold starts and at elevated temperatures.

features.title: Component Protection
features.desc: Maintains oil stability to protect engine, clutch, and gear systems from wear and corrosion.

applications: Modern four-stroke motorcycle engines (air-cooled and water-cooled)
On-road motorcycles and off-road dirt bikes
Both Japanese and European motorcycle models
Selected farm machinery and portable generator sets requiring similar lubricant specifications

faqs.q: What is the difference between 20W-50 and 20W-40?
faqs.a: The 20W-50 is thicker at operating temperature, better for high-heat or high-load conditions. The 20W-40 offers slightly better fuel efficiency and flow in moderate climates. Both provide excellent protection for high-power motorcycles.
JASO MA-2 is the highest JASO friction standard for wet clutch motorcycles. It ensures the oil provides the right friction characteristics to prevent clutch slippage in high-performance bikes.

faqs.q: Is this suitable for my dirt bike?
faqs.a: Yes, the Amihan 4T Tempest is suitable for both on-road motorcycles and off-road dirt bikes requiring API SL / JASO MA-2 performance.
